intro: Mesostemma karatavicum is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, native to the tropical regions of Western Ghats in India. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and improving overall well-being.
